image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about OLED vs LCD than social media does.
Context visual: OLEDs emit their own light, while LCDs rely on backlighting. But why does that matter?
Escalation visual: OLEDs provide deeper blacks and vibrant colors, but they can be pricier and suffer from burn-in.
Evidence visual: In contrast, LCDs are more durable and affordable, but they struggle with color accuracy in dark scenes.
Payoff visual: Ultimately, choose OLED for stunning visuals and LCD for reliability. The choice depends on your budget and use case.
Cta visual: Want more tech insights? Follow for the latest updates!
